name: @tanstack/lit-query
description: Lit adapter for TanStack Query Core

scripts.build: npm run build:esm && npm run build:cjs
scripts.build:cjs: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist-cjs', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.cjs.json && node scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs
scripts.package:build: npm run build && publint --strict && attw --pack && npm run package:smoke:cjs-types
scripts.example:e2e: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e
scripts.example:e2e:headed: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:headed
scripts.example:e2e:query-error: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:query-error
scripts.example:e2e:mutation-error: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:mutation-error
scripts.example:e2e:refetch-button: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:refetch-button
scripts.example:e2e:lifecycle-reconnect: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:lifecycle-reconnect
scripts.example:e2e:lifecycle-contract: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:lifecycle-contract
scripts.example:e2e:all: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:all
scripts.example:e2e:all:headed: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app run e2e:all:headed
scripts.example:pagination:e2e: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:prefetch: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:prefetch
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:error: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:error
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:mutations: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:mutations
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:boundary: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:boundary
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:all: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:all
scripts.example:pagination:e2e:all:headed: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-pagination-app run e2e:all:headed
scripts.example:ssr:dev: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-ssr-app run dev
scripts.example:ssr:dev:public-origin: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-ssr-app run dev:public-origin
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:default: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:error: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:error
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:refreshing: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:refreshing
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:public-origin: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:public-origin
scripts.example:ssr:e2e: npm run example:ssr:e2e:default && npm run example:ssr:e2e:public-origin
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:all:default: npm run build && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:all
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:all:nobuild: npm --prefix examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:all && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-ssr-app run e2e:public-origin
scripts.example:ssr:e2e:all: npm run example:ssr:e2e:all:default && npm run example:ssr:e2e:public-origin
scripts.demo:setup: npm run example:install && npm --prefix examples/lit-query-e2e-app exec playwright install chromium
scripts.demo:gate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test && npm run build && npm run package:check && npm run package:build && npm run example:e2e:all:nobuild && npm run example:ssr:e2e:all:nobuild && npm run measure:bundle:raw && npm run perf:l3:raw
scripts.demo:gate:headed: npm run build && npm run example:e2e:all:headed
